title: Pipeline State
description: Live state of all features/workstreams in the skills pipeline. Updated by skills on every significant transition and by /workflow reconciliation.

archive.description: Relative path to the archive file containing completed features, e.g. .github/pipeline-state-archive.json

config.description: Repo-level config bridged from context.yml by skills. Consumed by the viz to set default governance mode.

regulated.description: Mirrors context.yml meta.regulated — enables strict-policy default in viz

strictPolicyDefault.description: Explicit strict-policy default, independent of regulated flag

programmes.description: Programme-track initiatives. Each contains workstream slugs.

features.description: All features and workstreams — both programme and standalone.

complianceProfile.description: Triggers regulated-feature policy in viz and compliance bundle in /release

coverageMapPath.description: Relative path to the coverage-map.html produced by /coverage-map

coverageRisk.description: Overall coverage risk rating from /coverage-map or /trace

blocker.description: Human-readable blocker description if health is red

traceStatus.description: Traceability check result written by /trace skill

guardrails.description: Per-guardrail compliance status for this feature. Written by /review (Category E), /definition-of-ready (H9, H-NFR), /definition-of-done (NFR check), /trace (architecture check). Each entry tracks one guardrail item.

id.description: Unique guardrail identifier, e.g. MC-SEC-01, ADR-001, NFR-PERF-01, CF-PCI-01

evidence.description: Brief evidence or reference: story slug, review finding ID, decision ID

exception.description: If excepted: RISK-ACCEPT reference from decisions.md

assessedBy.description: Skill that last assessed this guardrail, e.g. /review, /definition-of-ready

spikes.description: Architecture spike records for this feature. Each spike tracks a design investigation with a verifiable verdict. Written by /test-plan checkpoint; updated at spike closeout by the operator.

verdict.description: Spike investigation verdict. Null until closeout.

outputArtefact.description: Relative path to the spike output artefact

verdictAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the verdict was recorded

stories.description: Flat story list for Phase 3+ features. Full story state lives here; epics[].stories[] holds slug references only. Written by /test-plan, /definition-of-ready, and inner loop skills.

testFile.description: Relative path to the test JS file

dorArtefact.description: Relative path to the DoR artefact

dorContractArtefact.description: Relative path to the DoR contract artefact

stories.description: Story items — may be full story objects (Phase 1/2 style) or string slug references (Phase 3+ style where full objects live in feature.stories[])

dorApprover.description: GitHub username (or equivalent role identifier) of the person who approved the DoR. NEVER stores full name or email address (MC-PII constraint). Written by approval channel adapter (p2.8).

dorChannel.description: Approval interface used to record the sign-off (e.g. 'github-issue'). Permanent record — not overwritten by subsequent sign-off attempts (p2.8 auditability).

dorSignedOffAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the DoR sign-off event. Written by approval channel adapter (p2.8).

resultPattern.description: Result pattern used by the surface adapter — 'checklist' for manual surface types (ADR-003)

regulated.description: True when the story requires regulated (T3M1) audit fields in its trace entry. Derived from the parent feature complianceProfile value.

standardsInjected.description: Q2 (MODEL-RISK T3M1): Standards injected into this story's evaluation. Each item has at minimum { id: string, hash: string }.

watermarkResult.description: Q5 (MODEL-RISK T3M1): Regression check result. Object { pass: boolean, passRate: number } where passRate is 0.0–1.0.

stalenessFlag.description: Q6 (MODEL-RISK T3M1): True when the evaluation detected a stale baseline that may have inflated pass rates.

sessionIdentity.description: Q7 (MODEL-RISK T3M1): Agency of the agent session that ran the evaluation. Object { sessionId: string, agentType: string, startedAt: string (ISO 8601) }.

releaseReady.description: Set true by /definition-of-done when all ACs are covered

layoutGapsAtMerge.description: True if CSS-layout test gaps existed at merge time (written by /definition-of-done)

layoutGapsRiskAccepted.description: True if the layout gap risk was explicitly accepted at merge (written by /definition-of-done)

tasks.description: Implementation plan tasks for this story, written by /implementation-plan and updated by /tdd

tddState.description: TDD phase: not-started → committed (red test written) → green (passing) → refactor → done

file.description: Relative path to the implementation plan task file

fleetSquad.title: Fleet Squad Registration File
fleetSquad.description: Per-squad registration file at fleet/squads/{id}.json. Created by squad operators to join the fleet registry. registry_mode mirrors the squad's context.yml registry_mode field.

squadId.description: Unique identifier for the squad, used as the key in fleet-state.json

repoUrl.description: URL of the squad's repository (no credentials)

pipelineStateUrl.description: URL or local path to the squad's pipeline-state.json

registeredAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the squad registered

registry_mode.description: Mirrors the squad's context.yml registry_mode. Only squads with publishing are included in fleet-state.json.

fleetStateEntry.title: Fleet State Entry
fleetStateEntry.description: One aggregated entry per squad in fleet-state.json. Written by the fleet-aggregation CI job.

squadId.description: Unique squad identifier, from the squad's fleet/squads/{id}.json

stage.description: Current pipeline stage from the squad's pipeline-state.json. 'unknown' if unreachable.

health.description: Aggregated health signal from the squad's pipeline-state.json. 'unknown' if the pipelineStateUrl was unreachable.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the aggregation run that wrote this entry

sourceUrl.description: The pipelineStateUrl from the squad's registration file — verbatim

error.description: Present only when health is unknown — describes the failure (e.g. HTTP 404, network timeout)

fleetState.title: Fleet State
fleetState.description: CI-aggregated state of all registered squads. Written by the fleet-aggregation job. Read by pipeline-viz.html fleet panel.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when fleet-state.json was last generated

squads.description: One entry per squad with registry_mode: publishing

phase4.description: Phase 4 spike verdicts shortcut — convenience lookup for tests and tooling. Updated at spike closeout alongside features[0].spikes[].verdict.

spikes.description: Spike verdict map. Keys are spike-id strings (spike-a, spike-b1, spike-b2, spike-c, spike-d).

outputArtefact.description: Relative path to the spike output artefact
